source: Compiled from public data center reports, SEC filings, and industry databases

datacenters.name: Ashburn / Loudoun County
datacenters.notes: Largest data center market globally. ~70% of world internet traffic routes through.

datacenters.name: Dallas / Fort Worth
datacenters.notes: Major interconnection hub. ERCOT grid — isolated from eastern/western grids.

datacenters.name: Phoenix / Mesa
datacenters.notes: Rapid growth market. Cheap land, but extreme heat and water scarcity.

datacenters.name: Chicago
datacenters.notes: Major financial exchange hub. Cold climate aids cooling.

datacenters.name: San Jose / Santa Clara
datacenters.notes: Tech HQ proximity. Cleaner grid via CA renewables mandate.

datacenters.name: New York City Metro
datacenters.notes: Financial services hub. Constrained power and space.

datacenters.name: Atlanta
datacenters.notes: Southeast hub. Connected via major fiber routes.

datacenters.name: Portland / Hillsboro
datacenters.notes: PNW hydro power access. Cool climate.

datacenters.name: Quincy, WA
datacenters.notes: Cheap Columbia River hydroelectric power. Remote location.

datacenters.name: Denver
datacenters.notes: Growing market. Cool, dry climate at altitude.

datacenters.name: Houston
datacenters.notes: Energy sector proximity. Hurricane risk.

datacenters.name: Columbus, OH
datacenters.notes: AWS and Google investment hub. Central location, fiber density.

datacenters.name: Sacramento
datacenters.notes: Overflow from Silicon Valley. CA clean energy grid.

datacenters.name: Boston
datacenters.notes: Biotech/pharma computing. New England grid relatively clean.

datacenters.name: Minneapolis
datacenters.notes: Cold climate natural cooling advantage.

datacenters.name: Miami
datacenters.notes: Latin America connectivity hub. NAP of the Americas is key interconnection.

datacenters.name: Des Moines
datacenters.notes: Major hyperscaler campus location. Wind energy access.

datacenters.name: Las Vegas
datacenters.notes: Switch SuperNAP mega-campus. Solar potential but extreme water stress.

datacenters.name: Omaha
datacenters.notes: Emerging hyperscaler market. Central US fiber crossroads.

datacenters.name: Salt Lake City
datacenters.notes: Growing market. NSA data center nearby. Mountain west fiber route.
